events.name: The Rocky Horror Picture Show 50th Anniversary

ticketLimit.info: The established ticket limit is 9 tickets per order.

venues.name: Dominion Theatre

boxOfficeInfo.openHoursDetail: The Dominion Theatres box office is located within the theatre building on Tottenham Court Road and is open from 10am to 7.45pm on Monday to Saturday
boxOfficeInfo.acceptedPaymentDetail: Mastercard, Visa (credit and debit), Switch/Maestro, cash
boxOfficeInfo.willCallDetail: Collect tickets from the Dominion Theatre box office on the day of the show, one hour before the performance. Any tickets collected from the box office must be signed for by the cardholder. Letters of authorisation will be accepted. Please take your Ticketmaster reference number with you as proof of purchase.

venues.accessibleSeatingDetail: For those who require assistance or wish to book wheelchair spaces, it is important to book in advance to ensure availability and notify staff of any special requirements. Concessionary tickets for customers with a disability are available through the Dominion Box Office and can be booked via email, telephone or in person. For further information and assistance please call: 020 7927 0929 or email: access@dominiontheatre.com

generalInfo.generalRule: No cameras or recording equipment allowed. There is no facility to store pushchairs, prams and buggies. There is a cloakroom upstairs on the circle level where luggage and coats can be left during the performance. It is open approximately 45 minutes before the performance and there is a charge of £2 per item.
generalInfo.childRule: Children under the age of 5 cannot be admitted to the auditorium. Please see show pages at nederlander.co.uk/dominion-theatre for age restrictions for a specific production.

ada.adaCustomCopy:
To better accommodate your needs, Dominion Theatre has requested that all special seating accommodations be solicited only through their representatives. Please contact a Dominion Theatre representative for further help with your ticket purchase.*   Advance ticket purchase may be required.

* Box office information is subject to change.
ada.adaHours: The Dominion Theatres box office is located within the theatre building on Tottenham Court Road and is open from 10am to 7.45pm on Monday to Saturday.

events.name: The Rocky Horror Picture Show 50th Anniversary Spectacular Tour 2026

promoter.name: ASM T.A SHEFFIELD CITY HALL
promoter.description: ASM T.A SHEFFIELD CITY HALL / NTL / GBR

promoters.name: ASM T.A SHEFFIELD CITY HALL
promoters.description: ASM T.A SHEFFIELD CITY HALL / NTL / GBR

events.info: Following its sold-out North American tour, join the original Brad Majors - BARRY BOSTWICK, the original Magenta - PATRICIA QUINN , and the original Columbia - NELL CAMPBELL, for this once-in-a-lifetime screening event with a live shadow cast! Come celebrate the Rocky Horror Picture Show?s 50th anniversary with a showing of the 4k remastered film and an unforgettable, interactive evening featuring a pre-show Q&A with the three iconic stars, a live shadow cast performance throughout the movie, costume contest, memorabilia display with film artifacts, and more!
events.pleaseNote: Over 12s only. A max of 8 tickets per person and per household applies. Tickets in excess of 8 will be cancelled. For customers buying stalls tickets, please note that Stalls seating is not tiered and customers may stand during the performance. Standing will NOT be permitted in the Circle or Balcony, due to Health & Safety reasons. Patrons who therefore do not wish to stand during seated concerts need to book tickets in this area.

accessibility.info:
Wheelchair positions are for wheelchair users, accessible positions are for patrons with disabilities/conditions that are unable to use general area Seating/Standing but do not require a specific wheelchair space.

Please contact the venue accessible team on 01142 56 55 93 to arrange tickets that suit your individual access requirements, including accommodations for Assistance Dogs, visual or hearing impairments, BSL Interpreter and other specific needs.

You can also get in touch via Accessteam@utilitaarenasheffield.co.uk

For Accessible information please click

ticketLimit.info: Please note: There is a ticket Limit of 8 tickets per person and per credit card on this event

venues.name: Sheffield City Hall Oval Hall

boxOfficeInfo.openHoursDetail: Mon - Fri: 10:00am - 4:00pm The Box Office will be open for an event including weekends- please check our website for details - https://www.sheffieldcityhall.co.uk/

venues.parkingDetail: There is no onsite parking for City Hall, however there are numerous multi-storey and open car parks within easy walking distance.
venues.accessibleSeatingDetail: There is restricted wheelchair access within the building, please contact the venue for further information. Infra-red system available.

generalInfo.generalRule: No Cameras No Video or Audio recording devices. No backpacks. No cans/glass bottles. No Food.
generalInfo.childRule: Age restrictions differ from show to show.

ada.adaCustomCopy:
Wheelchair positions are for wheelchair users, accessible positions are for patrons with disabilities/conditions that are unable to use general area Seating/Standing but do not require a specific wheelchair space.
 
Please contact the venue accessible team on 01142 56 55 93 to arrange tickets that suit your individual access requirements, including accommodations for Assistance Dogs, visual or hearing impairments, BSL Interpreter and other specific needs.
 
You can also get in touch via Accessteam@utilitaarenasheffield.co.uk

events.name: Pentatonix

promoters.name: LIVE NATION (MUSIC) UK LTD (VENUES)
promoters.description: LIVE NATION (MUSIC) UK LTD (VENUES) / NTL / GBR

events.pleaseNote: Under 14s must be accompanied by an adult over 18. A max of 6 tickets per person and per household applies. Tickets in excess of 6 will be cancelled.

ticketLimit.info: Please note: There is a ticket limit of 6 tickets per person and per credit card on this event

venues.name: Utilita Arena Cardiff

boxOfficeInfo.phoneNumberDetail: Ticketmaster UK: 0870 154 40 40 International: +44 161 385 3500 Venue box office: 02920 224 488 Email: boxoffice.cardiff@livenation.co.uk
boxOfficeInfo.willCallDetail: Collect from the venue on the day of the show from one hour before doors open. Take the credit card used to make the booking and Ticketmaster reference number with you. The cardholder will be required to sign for the tickets. No duplicate tickets will be issued for any standing shows at this venue.

venues.parkingDetail: Available at NCP multi-storey car parks around venue. Please visit http://www.ncp.co.uk/ for up to date information regarding available parking in and around Cardiff. The postcode for Utilita Arena Cardiff is CF10 2EQ
venues.accessibleSeatingDetail: The venue is accessible to disabled patrons. Please contact the venue on 02920 234 509 for further information or you can email boxoffice.cardiff@livenation.co.uk

generalInfo.generalRule: Standard compact cameras and taking photos on your phone are fine. Professional/long lens cameras, selfie sticks, video cameras, ipads (tablets) and go-pros are permitted and will be confiscated. No food or drink items can be brought into the venue. However, there are concessions inside the venue from where food and drinks can be purchased. Live Nation reserves the right to allow audience members to stand in seated areas of the venue. No standing on seats within the arena is permitted. To speed up entry for all, it is preferred that no bags are brought to the venue. If you do need to bring a bag, only one small bag per person is permitted, and it must not be bigger than A4 size (29x21x15cm) The venue does not have any facility to take any bag larger than the permitted size of 29x21x15cm. Cloakroom available (at a charge per item) for coats, and for smaller items (within permitted dimensions). Security measures are in place, with bag checks on arrival.
generalInfo.childRule: It is recommended that under 14 should be accompanied by an adult. Customers wishing to purchase a ticket for a baby are advised to contact the venue prior to booking. A "baby" is defined as a child under two years old, too young to be able to sit on a seat or to walk. All other children will require a paid ticket (and seat).

ada.adaPhones:
For further information on Utilita Arena Cardiff's Access facilities:
Please e-mail boxoffice.cardiff@livenation.co.uk
ada.adaCustomCopy:
The venue's full inventory of tickets, including accessible tickets, are available online at www.ticketmaster.co.uk.

Please select the required Accessible Ticket from the Accessible Tickets list and then select the required seat from the options displayed on the seating map.

By purchasing an Accessible ticket online, you confirm that you, or a member of your party require Accessible tickets. Proof of eligibility (Personal Independence Payment, Disability Living Allowance, Carers/Attendance Allowance, Letter from a medical professional etc) must be provided prior to the event and forwarded to Ticketmaster as requested.  Bookings may be cancelled if tickets are requested without the eligibility criteria being met.

Upon arrival patrons should go to the box office and will be directed to the venue's dedicated customer service team. Please bring photo ID to collect your tickets anyone found abusing our access scheme may result in your booking being cancelled without the opportunity to rebook.

Please note:
• Accessible tickets can sell out very quickly and we recommend purchasing your tickets as soon as an event has gone on sale.
• Companion / carer tickets are subject to availability and are allocated at the time of purchase and must be added with the  accompanied paid Accessible ticket.

• Companions only available on specific Accessible allocation.

• Unfortunately, the venue is unable to issue Companion / Carer tickets to ticket holders purchasing from third party outlets.

events.name: Clearwater Creedence Revival + Ten Years After
events.description:
AGMP Presents

CLEARWATER CREEDENCE REVIVAL + TEN YEARS AFTER‘Fortunate Son’ Tour
Creedence Clearwater Revival are one of the most iconic rock groups of all time. Their all time classic hits such as  Proud Mary, Bad Moon Rising, Have You Ever Seen The Rain, Born on the Bayou, Fortunate Son, Down on the Corner, Up Around the Bend along with CCR and John Fogerty fan favourites are powerfully reprised by Clearwater Creedence Revival.
PETER BARTON – vocals, guitarALAN SAGAR – bassJIM KIRKPATRICK – guitarGEOFF HAMMOND – drums
Ten Years After are celebrated for timeless classics including I’m Going Home, Love Like A Man, Hear Me Calling, I’d Love To Change The World, and Let The Sky Fall, alongside four UK Top 10 albums – Stonedhenge, Undead, Ssssh, and Cricklewood Green. Their legendary performance at Woodstock in 1969 secured their place as one of the era’s most influential rock bands.
RIC LEE - DrumsSAMUEL C. LEES - Guitar/VocalsCRAIG FLETCHER - Bass/VocalsDAVE BURGOYNE - keyboards
An AGMP Concerts presentation.
Please note: Clearwater Creedence Revival are a tribute to the music of.C.C.R and John Fogerty and not the original band.
